title: Scrum framework configuration
description: Schema for .scrum/config.json. Pipeline keys (test_runner, coverage_tool, pragma_pattern, path_guard, merge_regression, static_analysis) and the stall_watchdog block are now described here; per-language sub-objects keep additionalProperties:true so language keys stay free-form. Top-level additionalProperties stays true so unforeseen keys don't force a migration. The autonomous-PO keys (po_mode, po, autonomous) are constrained.

test_runner.description: Per-language test command templates ({pbi_id}, {round} substituted). Read by the pbi-pipeline skill / quality-gate.sh.

coverage_tool.description: Per-language coverage tool. null disables the coverage gate project-wide.

pragma_pattern.description: Pragma marker for the coverage pragma-audit step. A plain string (single global marker, as in .scrum-config.example.json) or an object keyed per language.

path_guard.description: impl_globs[] and test_globs[] consumed by pre-tool-use-path-guard.sh for pbi-implementer / pbi-ut-author.

merge_regression.description: command run by merge-pbi.sh after each per-PBI merge; skipped with WARN when absent.

static_analysis.description: Project-declared reachability / dead-export commands for the cross-review whole-repo dead-code pass (feeds the `redundancy` audit axis). Each command runs via `bash -c` from the repo root; stdout+exit are aggregated into .scrum/reviews/static-analysis-r{n}.json. When commands[] is absent or empty, the pass falls back to the built-in Python `vulture` auto-run (when available). Meant for languages the built-in pass does not cover (e.g. knip / ts-prune for TypeScript, staticcheck for Go, cargo-udeps for Rust).

stall_watchdog.description: Settings for the external teammate-stall monitor scripts/stall-watchdog.sh (non-autonomous mode only).

pbi_idle_threshold_minutes.description: Per-PBI stall detector: nudge when a single in-flight PBI's own activity (artifact tree, worktree commits, dirty worktree files) is older than this, even while global activity stays fresh. Defaults to idle_threshold_minutes.

po_mode.description: Who plays the Product Owner role. 'human' = wait for user input at PO decision points (default when key absent). 'agent' = a Claude teammate (product-owner) decides automatically.

max_clarification_rounds.description: How many clarification round-trips with SM before the PO must commit a decision under best-effort.

max_integration_cycles.description: Maximum number of integration→development defect-fix cycles (Integration Tests / UAT & Release loop) before releasing as-is or aborting.
